detaileddescription.para:
Handy type to register the reference of a field to be postprocessed:
first part is the index in champs_postraitables_ array
second part is a boolean indicating if an interpolation will be needed (when projecting from face to elem)

briefdescription.para: list of fields that can be potentially postprocessed
the actual fields registered and managed by the post-processing part (=all the extra fields, not the main unknowns)

detaileddescription.para:
Index in 'champs_postraitables_' of each of the requested field for post-processing:
first part is the index in champs_postraitables_
second part is the field component number (-1) when not relevant and flag indicating if interpolation will be needed:

briefdescription.para: Temporary storage space used when invoking 'interpolate_to_center*'.

memberdef.argsstring: (int reset, const Nom &nom_cas, const double current_time) const
memberdef.name: ecrire_statistiques_bulles

memberdef.argsstring: (int reset, const Nom &nom_cas, const double current_time) const
memberdef.name: ecrire_statistiques_cisaillement

memberdef.argsstring: (int reset, const Nom &nom_cas, const double current_time) const
memberdef.name: ecrire_statistiques_rmf

detaileddescription.para: Retrieve requested field for postprocessing, potentially updating it.

briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: Compute the max possible timestep to use during the next iteration in order to not skip a time interval for postpro.

simplesect.para: max time step acceptable in order to land on a time for requirede post

detaileddescription.para: Initialise lata file and various other stuff
Was the field of name 'nom' requested for postprocessing?
Override to have a simpler logic than base class. We really want to retrieve names + location.
Override from 'Postraitement' since the logic is simpler here
Write the master lata file and prepare statistics and other stuff

When reseting time (see ProblemTrio::resetTime() documentation) we change the name of the postprocessing files with a new suffix. TODO: In the current setup suffix is "" meaning that the previous output are discarded. This might change in the future!
Methode qui met a jour l'indicatrice, les termes de repulsion ainsi que les termes interfaciaux : ai, kappa*ai, n(aux cellules)
Par definition, mettre igroup a -1 pour inclure toutes les bulles Dans ce cas, la methode met a jour l'ev de l'indicatrice au lieu de celui de interfaces_.groups_indicatrice_n_ns()[igroup]

Attention: de nombreux tableaux sont modifies par cette methode en sortie. Ils peuvent etre des tableaux de travail. Si on veut qu'il soient correctent pour la suite, il faut faire l'appel avec les champs globaux (incluant tous les groupes a la fin). Sinon, les champs en ai, normale ou grad_I ne contiendront qu'un groupe.
Override. Write the interface mesh if present, and the integer field 'COMPO_CONNEXE' on it.

briefdescription.para: Imprime le type de l'objet sur un flot de sortie.
Lit les directives de postraitement sur un flot d'entree.

detaileddescription.para: Format: Postraitement { Sondes bloc de lecture des sondes | Champs bloc de lecture des champs a postraiter | Statistiques bloc de lecture objet statistique | Fichier }

parameterdescription.para: du bloc statistique: mot clef "dt_post" attendu

node.label: FixedVector< std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< T, TRUSTArray< T > > >, N >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< T, TRUSTArray< T > > >, N >

node.label: FixedVector< std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< double, TRUSTArray< double > > >, N >

childnode.edgelabel: < std::shared_ptr< IJK_Field_template< double, TRUSTArray< double > > >, N >
